summary: Deploy-readiness testing completed. All 20 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) Plan normalization with legacy aliases (starterâ†’learner, boosterâ†’achiever, proâ†’master), (2) Liz Teacher plan-gated access with 403 for free users and model selection (gpt-4o-mini default), (3) Grammar Engine validation layer with PLACEHOLDER_PATTERNS, (4) Cambridge diagnostics (root_cause_analysis, study_plan in full-test evaluation), (5) Curated static visuals for process/map types returning image_url instead of SVG, (6) Lesson Registry STAGE_META, (7) Emily Teacher removal (404 on all /api/emily/* endpoints), (8) Frontend lib helpers verified.

test_credentials.note: Test user was created during testing as it did not exist in DB

seed_data_creation: Created test user tester@test.com during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deploy-readiness features fully tested. Key verified endpoints: (1) GET /api/plan/features - returns all plan tiers with features and prices. (2) GET /api/liz/status/{user_id} - returns plan info, has_access, usage stats, model info. (3) POST /api/liz/chat - returns 403 for free plan users. (4) GET /api/question-bank/stats - returns valid question counts. (5) GET /api/question-bank/writing/task1/generate-authentic?visual_type=process - returns curated image_url. (6) GET /api/question-bank/writing/task1/generate-authentic?visual_type=map - returns curated image_url. (7) POST /api/cambridge/evaluate/full-test - returns root_cause_analysis and study_plan. (8) GET /api/grammar-engine/{module_id}/learn - returns validated slides. (9) /api/emily/* - all return 404 (Emily removed). Frontend lib helpers verified: planAccess.js, recommendationRouting.js, lizAccess.js.

plan_normalization.details: LEGACY_PLAN_ALIASES correctly maps starterâ†’learner, boosterâ†’achiever, proâ†’master. normalize_plan_name() handles edge cases (null, empty, whitespace, case-insensitive).

liz_teacher_access_control.details: GET /api/liz/status returns plan info, has_access, usage stats. POST /api/liz/chat returns 403 for free users. Model selection uses gpt-4o-mini for chat, gpt-4o for complex tasks.

grammar_engine_validation.details: PLACEHOLDER_PATTERNS exist with 11 patterns. _is_meaningful_text() correctly rejects placeholder content.

cambridge_diagnostics.details: POST /api/cambridge/evaluate/full-test returns root_cause_analysis (list) and study_plan (dict with target_band, roadmap_steps, three_day_plan).

curated_task1_visuals.details: Process and map types return image_url from /static/visuals/ instead of SVG. Line graph still returns SVG.

lesson_registry_stage_meta.details: STAGE_META contains beginner, mastery, advanced with course_name, course_path, label.

frontend_lib_helpers.details: planAccess.js, recommendationRouting.js, lizAccess.js all exist with expected exports.

auth_flow.details: Login with test credentials works correctly.
